dialogue_text: for Oz has made me its ruler and the people like me. The only thing that worries me is how to cross the hill of the Hammer-Heads.
source_excerpt: "I will return to the Emerald City," he replied, "for Oz has made me its ruler and the people like me. The only thing that worries me is how to cross the hill of the Hammer-Heads."
